issues.sample: TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2013 SUZUKI GSX-R1000 MOTORCYCLE. WHILE SHIFTING FROM FIRST GEAR TO THE SECOND GEAR AT 5 MPH, THE ENGINE REVVED AND CAUSED THE VEHICLE TO RAISE OFF THE GROUND AND FLIP OVER. THE CRANK COVER AND TAIL LIGHT WERE FRACTURED AND THE FRONT RIM SUSTAINED DAMAGE. T

narrative.headline: What 2013 Suzuki Gsx-R1000 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Power Train (100% of reports).
